H-01.description: Unknown shell falls back to ~/.bashrc with warning

H-02.description: Non-standard zsh path detected as zsh via substring match

H-03.description: Idempotency uses exact literal match, not fuzzy df-factory match

H-04.description: curl-pipe-bash uses $SHELL env var for detection, not running process

H-05.description: PATH line uses $HOME not literal tilde

H-06.description: Profile file does not exist; install creates it

H-08.description: Appending while file open does not lose content

H-09.description: Script uses $HOME so it works for any home directory

H-10.description: Running script directly is identical to piping
